ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Time the image was uploaded */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* File size of the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image */,
  "upload_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the image was last modified */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Time the image was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being scored */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who gave the score */,
  "given_score" INTEGER /* Score given to the image */,
  "ground_truth" INTEGER /* Ground truth value for the image */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the score was given */,
  "score_time" TEXT /* Time the score was given */,
  "score_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes provided by the scorer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scorers" (
  "scorer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scorer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scorer */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score given by the scorer */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the score was given */,
  "score_time" TEXT /* Time the score was given */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes provided by the scorer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scorer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scorers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scorers_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being analyzed */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score being analyzed */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the image quality (e.g., improving, declining) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Time the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for analysis */,
  "analysis_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes provided by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., image quality, scoring trends) */,
  "report_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes provided by the user generating the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_contents" (
  "report_content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report content */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., text, image, chart) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_contents_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
